subTitle: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Naruto returns stronger to face deadly foes, save his friends, and fulfill his destiny in this action-packed anime journey filled with loyalty, growth, and ninja values.

title: After School Dice Club
subTitle: On her way home from school, shy Miki encounters a classmate named Aya who insists on taking her around town to see the sights; when they come across Midori, their class rep, they follow her to a gaming store and discover a new way to have fun.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: A young troublesome teen, Naruto, rises to power as he trains to become one of the most ferocious and powerful ninja in his locality.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: A young troublesome teen, Naruto, rises to power as he trains to become one of the most ferocious and powerful ninja in his locality.
